text.message: Why would I not take that port?
Just as entitled to it as you are
Because now you have one player focusing exclusively on you
Yea would’ve been scary if he got that port
I trade u like if u have that port blue. 2x1
I won the port fair and square so why rage??
Where’s a rule about no soloing??
Should I just not try to win and not try for the port?
Not the best strategy socially speaking
OJ got plowed by green but isn’t raging
It’s okay buddy boy no need to cry now
You’re the one mad not me king
Throw the game nice that’s fun for everyone
Lmao no why are you trading him after mono pull
You’re the only one with jnegtrity
I feel sry for you mate
